pi_items.source: Counted exactly 8 'def test_' function definitions across the generated test files in setup_task.sh
Confirmed by reading BUG 1, BUG 2, and BUG 3 comments and corresponding failing tests in setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The media_organizer codebase is completely synthetic and generated during setup. It is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/media_organizer. The code has exactly 3 deliberately introduced bugs: a GPS sign error (missing logic for South/West hemispheres), fragile date parsing (failing on non-colon separators), and unsafe file overwriting (using shutil.move without checking existence). There are exactly 8 tests in the test suite, contradicting the task metadata which claims there are 12 expected passing tests.
